description: Use this API to change the value of a CON of the line relay model in the designated relay slot of the from bus end of a specified branch. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_rlmod_con(ibus, jbus, id, rs, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_rlmod_con(ibus, jbus, id, rs, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model (1 for con(j), 2 for con(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no relay model on this branch at the bus IBUS end.
relay model at bus IBUS end is aaa not xxx.
no CONs used in model NAME.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
